description: Native app surfaces phase A6 (docs/design/native-app-surfaces.md): the mobile interaction vocabulary on iOS. swipe (directional and point-to-point forms) drives mobile: dragFromToForDuration; find auto-scrolls (bounded drag loop) to locate an entry deep in the Settings list; click.duration long-presses (mobile: touchAndHold); type presses the device Home button (mobile: pressButton) with no element criteria. Settings (com.apple.Preferences) is the target because it ships on every simulator runtime. SKIPs on non-macOS hosts via the platform gate; the first XCUITest session on a cold runner builds WebDriverAgent, so the startSurface timeout is generous.

tests.description: Find a top-of-list row ('General') and long-press it (touchAndHold; Settings ignores it, so the list stays put), swipe with both object forms, auto-scroll-find the simulator-only 'Developer' row near the bottom of the list, then press the device Home button criteria-less and close the app.
